scene.content: {"result":"{\"elements\":{\"content\":{\"children\":[\"icon\",\"fact\",\"number\"],\"props\":{\"align\":\"center\",\"direction\":\"vertical\",\"gap\":40,\"style\":{\"maxWidth\":\"none\",\"textAlign\":\"center\"}},\"type\":\"Stack\"},\"dog-emoji\":{\"props\":{\"style\":{\"fontSize\":\"120px\",\"lineHeight\":\"1\"},\"text\":\"🐕\"},\"type\":\"Text\"},\"fact\":{\"children\":[\"fact-text\"],\"props\":{\"delay\":800,\"duration\":600,\"preset\":\"slide-in-up\"},\"type\":\"Animate\"},\"fact-number\":{\"props\":{\"style\":{\"backgroundColor\":\"rgba(255,255,255,0.2)\",\"border\":\"2px solid white\",\"borderRadius\":\"50px\",\"color\":\"white\",\"fontSize\":\"28px\",\"fontWeight\":\"bold\",\"padding\":\"16px 32px\"},\"text\":\"FACT #1\"},\"type\":\"Badge\"},\"fact-text\":{\"props\":{\"level\":1,\"style\":{\"color\":\"white\",\"fontSize\":\"80px\",\"fontWeight\":\"800\",\"lineHeight\":\"1.1\",\"maxWidth\":\"1400px\",\"textShadow\":\"0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)\"},\"text\":\"A dog's nose print is unique, like a human fingerprint\"},\"type\":\"Heading\"},\"icon\":{\"children\":[\"dog-emoji\"],\"props\":{\"delay\":300,\"duration\":800,\"preset\":\"bounce-in\"},\"type\":\"Animate\"},\"main\":{\"children\":[\"content\"],\"props\":{\"colors\":[\"#1e3a8a\",\"#3b82f6\",\"#60a5fa\"],\"direction\":\"135deg\",\"style\":{\"alignItems\":\"center\",\"display\":\"flex\",\"height\":\"100vh\",\"justifyContent\":\"center\",\"padding\":\"80px\",\"width\":\"100%\"}},\"type\":\"Gradient\"},\"number\":{\"children\":[\"fact-number\"],\"props\":{\"delay\":1400,\"duration\":500,\"preset\":\"fade-in\"},\"type\":\"Animate\"}},\"root\":\"main\",\"state\":{}}"}
